string.name: module_desc
string.value: M-Pencil 电量监测与阈值提醒模块

string.name: EntryAbility_desc
string.value: M-Pencil 护电提醒主入口能力

string.name: permission_reason_bluetooth
string.value: 用于扫描并连接 M-Pencil，读取实时电量。

string.name: permission_reason_location
string.value: HarmonyOS 的 BLE 扫描依赖位置相关权限识别附近设备。

string.name: permission_reason_vibrate
string.value: 用于在达到提醒阈值时触发振动提醒。
